DMERC_OXGN_EQUIP_INITL_DT 
LABEL: 
Oxygen Equipment Initial Date 
DESCRIPTION: The initial date for oxygen equipment. 
SHORT NAME: DMERC_OXGN_EQUIP_INITL_DT 
LONG NAME: DMERC_OXGN_EQUIP_INITL_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is not populated before 2023. This is to support the elimination of the Certificate of Medical 
Necessity
